programme.title: Kim's Convenience
programme.desc: When Umma wants a new dishwasher, Appa is determined to get the best deal; Janet adopts a new name; Jung tries to get his job back at Handy.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience
programme.desc: Appa tries to convince Umma that he's still attractive; Jung returns to Handy; Gerald's girlfriend makes herself at home.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience
programme.desc: Appa and Umma unwittingly end up in marriage counseling; Jung learns more about Shannon's boyfriend than he bargained for; Janet debates whether or not to share a potential mentor with Gerald.

programme.title: Mr. D
programme.desc: Gerry discovers that teaching phys ed comes up a lot of paperwork; Bobbi tries to juggle work and a newborn; Lisa becomes friends with some moms who may have dirt on Xavier.

programme.title: Mr. D
programme.desc: Gerry ends up in a compromising situation after the teacher auction; Emma enlists Dwyer to do some repairs in the library; Trudy gets a surprise visit.

programme.title: Mr. D
programme.desc: Gerry is in awe of the concept of work-to-rule; Lisa tries setting boundaries between her and her stepson; Nisha accidentally reveals too much to her students.

programme.title: Son of a Critch
programme.desc: Mark starts high school at a former girls' school, finding joy in theater while navigating old friendships and new love; pop's ham radio hobby leads him to an intercepted distress signal.

programme.title: Son of a Critch
programme.desc: Tensions rise between rival schools as Fox finds a friend who invites her to a field party; Mark worries about older kids; Mike Jr hires Dick's daughter as the new VOCM promo girl.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: David and Stevie set out on a romantic getaway; Johnny steps in at a Jazzagals rehearsal and wows everyone with his skills; Alexis tests out a dating app.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: David looks for a way to reconcile with Patrick after spending time away from him; Moira pitches the idea of a singles week event.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Johnny and Moira get too involved at a singles event; Alexis runs into an old friend.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Moira tries to get out of jury duty; David runs damage control for a Rose Apothecary product.

programme.title: Workin' Moms
programme.desc: Between Mike troubles, a Tru Air P.R. crisis and a birthday dinner with less-than-delightful in-laws, Kate's plate is full; a misstep from Alice puts Anne's book in jeopardy, and Jenny goes on the warpath for equal pay.

programme.title: Workin' Moms
programme.desc: Kate and Nathan struggle with their new living arrangement; Frankie and Juniper take their investigation of Sean too far; Anne looks at her relationship with Alice in a new light.

programme.title: Workin' Moms
programme.desc: A lice outbreak at camp becomes everyone's worst nightmare; Kate's interview soon proves somewhat uncomfortable. Anne quarantines her house while Frankie tries to sell a home under false pretences.

programme.title: Workin' Moms
programme.desc: Kate finds herself in the middle of a PR crisis for her new client Après; Anne is inspired by a new book idea; Frankie and Bianca discover the truth about Sean.

programme.desc: Gerry discovers that teaching phys ed comes up a lot of paperwork; Bobbi tries to juggle work and a newborn; Lisa becomes friends with some moms who may have dirt on Xavier.

programme.title: Workin' Moms
programme.desc: Kate desperately searches the brewery for Charlie while Frankie seizes an opportunity for vengeful justice; Jenny's employers see things her way; Anne and Lionel make a life-changing decision.

programme.title: Strays
programme.desc: Shannon tries to build a more inclusive culture at work; Lara interferes in a radio contest.

programme.title: Baroness von Sketch Show
programme.desc: Tips for bingeing on drama; suggestions for what to say at a funeral; a corporate listening circle.

programme.title: CBC Winnipeg Comedy Festival
programme.desc: Hosted by Pete Zedlacher; performances by Matt Falk, Danish Anwar, Jess Salomon, Martha Chaves, Nitish Sahkuja and Ryan Williams.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience
programme.desc: Appa attempts to get cheap Wi-Fi; Janet is forced to do a reading at church; Jung and Katie hit it off.
